texto: Responsibility: Seeing something you don’t want to see.Not seeing something you do want to see.Hearing something you don’t want to hear.Not hearing something you do want to hear.Saying something you don’t want to say.Not saying something you do want to say.Touching something you don’t want to touch.Not touching something you do want to touch.Doing something you don’t want to do.Not doing something you do want to do.Being responsible when you don’t want to.Not being responsible when you do want to.
explicacao: Citação de Leah-Pearl sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Responsibility: Seeing something you don’t want to see.Not seeing something you do want to see.He…” articula reflexao, responsibility, something em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
